description: Comprehensive evidence figure: disrupted active site, 3D geometry, and cross-species PGRP-LC classification
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(16, 14))

# Panel A: 3D Active-Site Schematic
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(2, 2, 1)
ax1.set_title('A. Active-Site Geometry\n(AlphaFold Model AF-A7UTA1-F1)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Draw a simplified 2D projection of the zinc site
# Catalytic PGRP active site (left)
positions_cat = {
    'H (Zn1)': (0.3, 0.7),
    'H (Zn2)': (0.7, 0.7),
    'C (Zn3)': (0.5, 0.3),
    'Zn²⁺': (0.5, 0.57),
    'Y (cat)': (0.2, 0.4),
}

# Draw lines to zinc
for label, pos in positions_cat.items():
    if label != 'Zn²⁺' and label != 'Y (cat)':
        ax1.plot([pos[0], 0.5], [pos[1], 0.57], 'b-', linewidth=2, alpha=0.5)

# Draw circles
for label, pos in positions_cat.items():
    if label == 'Zn²⁺':
        circle = plt.Circle(pos, 0.05, color='#3498db', zorder=5)
        ax1.add_patch(circle)
        ax1.text(pos[0], pos[1], 'Zn²⁺', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
    else:
        color = '#27ae60'  # green for functional
        circle = plt.Circle(pos, 0.06, color=color, zorder=5)
        ax1.add_patch(circle)
        ax1.text(pos[0], pos[1], label.split('(')[0].strip(), ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)
        ax1.text(pos[0], pos[1]-0.09, f'({label.split("(")[1]}' if '(' in label else '', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='gray')

ax1.text(0.5, 0.95, 'Catalytic PGRP\n(e.g., PGRP-LB)', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#27ae60')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax1.set_ylim(0.1, 1)
ax1.set_aspect('equal')
ax1.axis('off')

# Panel B: Ag PGRPLC active site (disrupted)
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(2, 2, 2)
ax2.set_title('B. Disrupted Site in Ag PGRPLC\n(A7UTA1)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

positions_ag = {
    'A310': (0.3, 0.7),     # H→A substitution
    'H421': (0.7, 0.7),     # Remaining His
    'S429': (0.5, 0.3),     # C→S substitution
    'Y347': (0.2, 0.4),     # Catalytic Tyr (conserved)
}

# NO zinc - draw an X where it would be
ax2.text(0.5, 0.57, '✗', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=20, color='#e74c3c', fontweight='bold', zorder=6)
ax2.text(0.5, 0.48, 'No Zn²⁺', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='#e74c3c', fontweight='bold')

# Draw dashed lines (broken coordination)
for label, pos in positions_ag.items():
    if label not in ['Y347']:
        ax2.plot([pos[0], 0.5], [pos[1], 0.57], '--', color='#e74c3c', linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.5)

colors_ag = {'A310': '#e74c3c', 'H421': '#27ae60', 'S429': '#e74c3c', 'Y347': '#27ae60'}
labels_ag = {'A310': 'A\n(H→A)', 'H421': 'H\n(kept)', 'S429': 'S\n(C→S)', 'Y347': 'Y\n(kept)'}

for label, pos in positions_ag.items():
    circle = plt.Circle(pos, 0.06, color=colors_ag[label], zorder=5)
    ax2.add_patch(circle)
    ax2.text(pos[0], pos[1], labels_ag[label], ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white', zorder=6)

# Distance annotations
ax2.annotate('', xy=(0.3, 0.7), xytext=(0.5, 0.3),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='gray', lw=1))
ax2.text(0.33, 0.47, '3.6 Å', fontsize=7, color='gray', rotation=55)

ax2.annotate('', xy=(0.7, 0.7), xytext=(0.5, 0.3),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='gray', lw=1))
ax2.text(0.65, 0.47, '5.7 Å', fontsize=7, color='gray', rotation=-55)

ax2.text(0.5, 0.95, 'Ag PGRPLC (TARGET)\n2/3 Zn ligands substituted', ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='#e74c3c')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax2.set_ylim(0.1, 1)
ax2.set_aspect('equal')
ax2.axis('off')

# Panel C: Cross-species PGRP-LC comparison
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(2, 1, 2)
ax3.set_title('C. PGRP Family: Catalytic vs Non-Catalytic Classification', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

# Data
proteins = [
    ('Dm PGRP-LB', 'Q8INK6', 'Catalytic', True, True, True),
    ('Dm PGRP-SC1a', 'C0HK98', 'Catalytic', True, True, True),
    ('Dm PGRP-SC1b', 'C0HK99', 'Catalytic', True, True, True),
    ('Dm PGRP-SB1', 'Q70PY2', 'Catalytic', True, True, True),
    ('Hs PGLYRP2', 'Q96PD5', 'Catalytic', True, True, True),
    ('', '', '', None, None, None),  # separator
    ('Ag PGRPLC ★', 'A7UTA1', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
    ('Dm PGRP-LC (x)', 'Q9GNK5', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
    ('Dm PGRP-LC (a)', 'A0A0S0WMR4', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
    ('Dm PGRP-LC (y)', 'E1JI88', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
    ('Bl PGRP-LC', 'A0A4P8NZ09', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
    ('Bm PGRP-LC', 'A0A4P8NZ13', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
    ('Dm PGRP-SA', 'Q9VYX7', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
    ('Dm PGRP-LE', 'Q9VXN9', 'Non-catalytic', False, True, False),
]

y_pos = 0
cols = ['HH motif\n(Zn lig 1)', 'IIxH pattern\n(structural)', 'CPG motif\n(Zn lig 3)']

for i, (name, acc, classification, hh, iixh, cpg) in enumerate(proteins):
    if classification is None:
        y_pos -= 0.4
        ax3.axhline(y=y_pos + 0.2, color='blue', linewidth=1, linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)
        ax3.text(-0.5, y_pos + 0.2, 'Catalytic ↑ | Non-catalytic ↓', fontsize=8, color='blue', alpha=0.6)
        continue
    
    # Protein label
    color = '#c0392b' if '★' in name else 'black'
    fontweight = 'bold' if '★' in name else 'normal'
    ax3.text(-0.1, y_pos, name, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, color=color, fontweight=fontweight)
    ax3.text(3.3, y_pos, acc, ha='left', va='center', fontsize=7, color='gray')
    
    # Feature boxes
    features = [hh, iixh, cpg]
    for j, feat in enumerate(features):
        x = j * 1.0 + 0.1
        if feat:
            fc = '#27ae60'
            text = '✓'
        else:
            fc = '#e74c3c'
            text = '✗'
        rect = plt.Rectangle((x, y_pos - 0.3), 0.8, 0.6, facecolor=fc, edgecolor='white', linewidth=1)
        ax3.add_patch(rect)
        ax3.text(x + 0.4, y_pos, text, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='white', fontweight='bold')
    
    y_pos -= 0.8

# Column headers
for j, col in enumerate(cols):
    ax3.text(j * 1.0 + 0.5, 1.0, col, ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')

ax3.set_xlim(-3.5, 5)
ax3.set_ylim(y_pos - 0.5, 1.5)
ax3.axis('off')

# Add verdict box
fig.text(0.5, 0.01, 
         "VERDICT: GO:0008745 (N-acetylmuramoyl-L-alanine amidase activity) is OVER-ANNOTATED on Ag PGRPLC (A7UTA1)\n"
         "All PGRP-LC orthologs universally lack the HH motif and catalytic Cys required for zinc-dependent amidase catalysis",
         ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', color='#c0392b',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#fdf2e9', edgecolor='#c0392b', linewidth=2))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.subplots_adjust(bottom=0.1)
plt.savefig('final_evidence_figure.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final evidence figure saved")
